defense.critical_failure: The target takes double initial and persistent damage.
defense.failure: The target takes full initial and persistent damage.
defense.success: The target takes half initial damage and no persistent damage.

heightened.text: The initial poison damage increases by 1d4, and the persistent poison damage increases by 1d4.

spell.name: Puff of Poison
spell.text: You exhale a shimmering cloud of toxic breath at an enemy's face. The target takes 1d4 poison damage and 1d4 persistent poison damage, depending on its Fortitude save.

traits.name: Cantrip
traits.text: A spell you can cast at will that is automatically heightened to half your level rounded up.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.

traits.name: Poison
traits.text: An effect with this trait delivers a poison or deals poison damage. An item with this trait is poisonous and might cause an affliction.
